_comment: Pinned AM Q1 2026 quarterly compensation. Joy is the AM manager — her individual commission, manage deal, Q4 pending and Q4 Wipro clawback all roll up into the manager_incentive block (NOT into commission.reps). Bullet bars on the Sales Target view still include her achievement vs quota.

commission.team_deduction_reason: Reps without a manage deal closed in Q1 incur a 10% deduction on achieved commission.
commission.eligibility_text: A minimum of 50% achievement of the individual quota is mandatory to qualify for commission payout.

reps.name: Vivin Joseph
reps.note: Q1 base: 1% × $60,181 payment received = $602. −10% deduction = $542. Plus Q4 FY25 Vendasta CF Manage Deal: $6,300 × 10% = $630. Total = $1,172.

pending_commissions.note: Q4 pending deal whose payment was received in Q1. Paid at Q4 rate (1%).

clawbacks.label: Wipro Q4 cancellation — slab adjustment
clawbacks.note: Wipro deal $66,787 cancelled (Q4 slab was 4%; correct slab is 1%). Adjustment = $54,515 × 3% = $1,635 deducted in Q1.

manager_incentive.calculation_note: Q1 commission $1,502 + Q4 pending $55 = Q1 gross $1,557. Final = $1,557 − $1,635 (Q4 Wipro adjustment) = −$78. No payout for Q1 2026; the −$78 balance carries forward to the next compensation cycle.
